description: New /after/[slug] page: 'What to watch after X' showing sequels and similar recommendations
steps: Create src/app/after/[slug]/page.tsx: A server-rendered page that shows 'What to Watch After [Anime Title]'. Fetch the anime by slug, then: (1) Get direct sequels from AnimeRelation where fromAnimeId=anime.id and relationType='SEQUEL'. (2) Get side stories and spin-offs from AnimeRelation. (3) Get similar recommendations using the getRecommendations function from lib/recommendations.ts (already exists and works well). (4) Include metadata, canonical URL, breadcrumbs, JSON-LD structured data (ItemList).

The page layout should be: (1) Hero section with the source anime's banner/cover and title. (2) 'Continue the Story' section showing sequels in order. (3) 'Side Stories & Spin-offs' section. (4) 'Similar Anime You Might Enjoy' section with the recommendation results (show top 10). Each section uses AnimeCard with filler data where available.
Add generateStaticParams for the top 50 most popular anime by fetching them from the database.
Add metadata generation: title='What to Watch After [Title] - Recommendations | AniYume', description explaining sequels and similar anime available.
Update src/app/sitemap.ts: add after/[slug] pages for anime that have relations (sequels/prequels). Query anime that have at least one AnimeRelation record. Map them to sitemap entries.
Include fillerMapping in the queries for the recommended anime so AnimeCard can show filler badges.
acceptance_criteria: /after/[slug] page renders with sequels, side stories, and recommendations sections
Page has proper metadata and canonical URL
Sequels are shown in correct order
Recommendations come from the existing getRecommendations function
Sitemap includes after/ pages for anime with relations
verification: Run: cd /projects/sandbox/anime-guide-engine && npx prisma generate && npx next build
findings: Build passes cleanly. The /after/[slug] page generates static params for top 50 anime. Sitemap queries anime with relations using OR condition on relationsFrom/relationsTo. Recommendations from getRecommendations do not include fillerMapping so filler data is not passed for recommendation cards (acceptable per spec).
